resources.string: Detects when a locked app comes to the foreground and shows the biometric lock screen. Uses window-change events only; it never reads screen content.
Unlock with fingerprint or device PIN
Protection is not active until both items above are enabled.
Immediately when I leave the app
Every newly installed app is locked until you approve it with your fingerprint — like iPhone install approval.
Stops anyone from disabling AppLock’s accessibility service or uninstalling it from Settings.
Being a device admin blocks uninstalling AppLock until you deactivate it here.
Device admin: active — AppLock cannot be uninstalled
Disabling this allows AppLock to be uninstalled, removing all app locks.
AppLock is fully event-driven: no polling, no background timers, no foreground service, and it never reads screen content. Its battery use is effectively zero on stock Android.
Some brands (Xiaomi, Huawei, Oppo…) kill background services anyway. If protection stops working, exempt AppLock from battery optimization — this does not increase its power use.
%1$s was just installed and has been locked. Unlock it with your fingerprint the first time you open it.
